author: valleytheknight
description: Auto-layout and arrange Canvas cards into a grid, pick one up and place it with a hotkey instead of dragging, or find a card in a cluster with a text search. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ValleytheKnight
manifest.description: Auto-layout, arrange, and move Canvas cards without precise dragging: grid-tidy a messy board, pick up and place a card with a hotkey, or find and grab a card by text search in a dense cluster.
manifest.name: Canvas Positioning Toolkit

name: Canvas Positioning Toolkit

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial release: grid auto-layout for tidying a messy Canvas board, a hotkey-driven pick-up-and-place move for pulling one card out of a dense cluster without precise dragging (touch-compatible), and a fuzzy-search command to find and pick up a card by its text.
